title: balance() threshold=-1 fix: correct and well-explained; regression test has proper independent oracle
description: Why this choice is correct: using -1 (rather than saturating_sub to 0) as the threshold when scan_tip < min_confirmations is the minimal precise fix. It makes 'block_height <= -1' structurally impossible, which directly mirrors the documented formula 'depth >= min_confirmations is unsatisfiable when scan_tip < min_confirmations'. A contributor might suggest 'just add block_height > 0 to the SQL' — wrong, because that breaks min_confirmations=0 semantics (a note at height 0 with 0 required confirmations should be confirmed). The regression test derives expected values from the formula independently of balance(), which is the correct oracle discipline.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change required
